response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video for scene transitions, which were determined by on-screen text and graphical changes (promotional splashes, concert attention details, merch displays, and fan message slides).
2. Monitored the audio throughout the video. The background music is a consistent instrumental electronic track used as a promotional theme for the 'All for One' concert.
3. No vocal music (singing with lyrics) was detected in the audio track.
4. Performed a web search for 'hololive English ALLFORONE concert theme song' and confirmed it is an instrumental theme.
5. Marked 'contains_vocal_music' as false for all detected scenes.
response.global_summary: A promotional and fan-message showcase video for the 'hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One-' event, featuring a consistent instrumental background track throughout the entire duration.

scenes.description: Promotional splash screen for 'On the Run!' hololive English Advent 2nd Anniversary Live.
Promotional graphic for 'Ollie's holoplus ZOM-RAID TIME' with QR code.
Promotional splash screen for 'hololive English 3rd Concert ALLFORONE'.
'Attention' screen for concert visitors detailing flashing lights and cheering rules.
Merch display screen for 'Essentials Pack' (28 types) and Light Stick.
Merch display screen for Tapestry, Acrylic Panel, and Mug.
Compilation of fan-submitted messages and artwork for the 'ALLFORONE' concert.
Concluding promotional splash screen for 'On the Run!' hololive English Advent 2nd Anniversary Live.
